hot_deals_rotation.note: Hot Deals event rotation schedule. Season schedule resets at start of each new season. Off-season loops in 4-week cycles until next season starts.

off_season_schedule.note: Loops in 4-week cycles until next season starts. No fixed duration.

Hero_Exclusive_Weapon_Battle_Pass.note: Runs Thursday to Thursday - spans 2 weeks. Gives hero-specific exclusive weapon shards.
Hero_Exclusive_Weapon_Battle_Pass.tip: Buy on Day 1 to maximize progression time

Hero_Shard_Spin_Roulette.note: Alternates between Spin and Roulette each season. S1/S3 = Roulette, S2/S4 = Spin
Hero_Shard_Spin_Roulette.tip: Prepare 1500 diamonds for key hero spins

Glittering_Market.tip: Best event for F2P - get DVA, Swift, Kimberly, Carlie, Tesla for 500 diamonds each (60 coins)

Drone_Training_Pass.tip: Best week to push drone upgrades and spend drone resources

Overlord_Training_Battle_Pass.note: Only appears after Overlord added on Day 89 of Season 2

Black_Market.availability: Off-Season only - after each season ends
Black_Market.tip: F2P players can unlock exclusive weapons here instead of paying for battle pass during season

strategic_notes: Glittering Market (Week 3/7) is the most important F2P event - plan diamonds in advance
Hero Exclusive Weapon Battle Pass is worth buying on Day 1 for maximum progression
Spin/Roulette alternates per season - S2 and S4 use Spin
Overlord Training Battle Pass only available from Day 89 of Season 2 onwards
Off-season Black Market lets F2P players unlock exclusive weapons cheaply
